title: Taxonomy Classification for E-commerce
scenario: Design a prompt to classify a set of products into a hierarchical taxonomy consisting of three levels: category, subcategory, and product type. The classification should be based on product attributes such as name, description, and price range. Assume the products are in JSON format and contain a mix of standard and custom attributes. The target LLM output should be a JSON object with the classified products at each level.
constraints: Must use a JSON-based classification library such as jsonschema
Must handle cases where a product belongs to multiple categories

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify the accuracy of the taxonomy classification using a testing dataset
Check if the prompt satisfies the constraints provided
Assess the clarity and conciseness of the prompt's explanation
